answer: Hello! Welcome to the College Enquiry System. How can I assist you today?
Admissions are open. You can apply online or visit the campus with required documents.
We offer B.Tech (CSE, ECE, ME, CE), BCA, MCA, MBA, and M.Tech programs.

Hostel facilities are available with WiFi, mess, and security.
Our placement rate is 92%. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, and Wipro.
You can contact us at info@college.edu or +91-XXXXXXXXXX.
We provide merit-based and need-based scholarships.
Our library has over 50,000 books and digital resources.
